features.name: chained AND with shared operand reuse
features.description: Code should include two chained combinational AND operations where one primary input appears as an operand in both the first AND and the second AND, with the output of the first AND also feeding the second AND, creating a shared-operand dependency chain

features.name: semantically equivalent subexpressions in combinational chain
features.description: Code should include a combinational logic chain where two intermediate signals are semantically equivalent (produce the same boolean result for all inputs) yet one is used as an operand by the other, exercising CSE or functional-reduction optimizations that may incorrectly introduce cycles
